description:
## Problem

The "Changeset Required" GitHub Actions check runs on ALL PRs, including promotion PRs (devâ†’staging, stagingâ†’main). Promotion PRs don't need changesets â€” the individual feature PRs already contain them. This caused a ghost pending check that blocked auto-merge on PR #89 and PR #90 for 4+ hours overnight.

## Fix

Update the changeset CI workflow (likely `.github/workflows/changeset-check.yml` or similar) to skip when:
- The PR base branch is `staging` (devâ†’staging promotion)
- The PR base branch is `main` (stagingâ†’main promotion)
- Or the PR head branch is `dev` or `staging`

## Acceptance Criteria
- Promotion PRs (devâ†’staging, stagingâ†’main) should NOT trigger the "Changeset Required" check
- Feature PRs targeting `dev` should still require changesets as before
- Auto-merge should not be blocked by stale changeset checks on promotion PRs
title: fix: exempt promotion PRs from "Changeset Required" CI check
